steps.title: Generalize from two samples
steps.content: The notes describe two types of brown seaweed, macrokelp and ma-konbu, that participants rated as having umami intensity. A generalization should move from those specific samples to a broader but properly limited claim about brown seaweed, without claiming all seaweeds or all brown seaweeds behave the same way.

steps.title: Reject narrow summaries
steps.content: A only classifies macrokelp and ma-konbu as brown seaweeds. B only describes the study procedure. C says "various seaweeds," but the notes support a claim about brown seaweed specifically. The answer is D.
